question: Which statement best describes stem cells?

options.text: They are fully specialized cells that cannot divide
options.explanation: Stem cells are not fully specialized; they are unspecialized and can divide over long periods.

options.text: They are unspecialized cells that can self-renew and become different cell types
options.explanation: Stem cells can self-renew and differentiate into specialized cells, making them useful for repair and research.

options.text: They are only found in embryos and cannot be used in adults
options.explanation: Adult stem cells also exist, so stem cells are not limited to embryos.

options.text: They are cells that only repair bone tissue
options.explanation: Stem cells can contribute to many tissues, not just bone.
